evals.prompt: I'm building an Astro marketing site with fulldev ui. Create a newsletter signup section using fulldev ui components with fields for full name and email address plus a submit button. The shell already uses Tailwind v4 and should stay Astro-first.
evals.expected_output: An Astro component that uses fulldev ui primitives, FieldGroup/Field form structure, semantic colors, gap-* spacing, and no React-only patterns.
expectations: Uses Astro component syntax rather than a React client component by default
Uses FieldGroup and Field components for form layout instead of raw div with space-y
Uses data-invalid on Field and aria-invalid on the input control for validation states when validation is shown
Uses gap-* spacing instead of space-y-* or space-x-*
Uses semantic color tokens instead of raw color classes
Does not introduce React hooks or JSX event handlers into a .astro example

evals.prompt: Add a hero section for an Astro landing page using fulldev ui. It should include a content-first layout with a headline, supporting copy, two buttons, and a visual tile. Prefer fulldev ui components over raw wrappers.
evals.expected_output: An Astro-first section composed from fulldev ui layout/content primitives such as Section, Tile, Button, List, or Item with semantic styling.
expectations: Searches or prefers @fulldev components before falling back to generic @shadcn items
Uses content-first fulldev ui primitives like Section or Tile instead of only raw div wrappers
Uses gap-* layout utilities instead of space-y-* or space-x-*
Keeps the output compatible with Astro and container-query usage
Uses Button variants instead of custom-styled anchor/button markup

evals.prompt: Set up fulldev ui in an existing Astro project that already has Tailwind v4. Describe the minimum required changes so I can install @fulldev/button and @fulldev/section successfully.
evals.expected_output: A setup sequence covering shadcn init, components.json registry config, tsconfig aliasing, fulldev base stylesheet import, and a container-aware root shell.
expectations: Mentions initializing the project with the shadcn CLI
Mentions copying or including the fulldev base stylesheet
Uses npx shadcn@latest add @fulldev/button as the install pattern
